title: README Generator
description: Generate a professional README.md from your project details in seconds
viralHook: Ship a polished README in 60 seconds flat

props.title: README.md Generator
props.description: Fill in your project details and generate a well-structured, professional README.md ready to drop into your repository.

fields.label: Project Name
fields.helperText: The name of your project as it appears in the repo

fields.label: Project Description
fields.placeholder: A blazing-fast CLI tool for generating type-safe API clients from OpenAPI specs. Supports TypeScript, Python, and Go output targets.
fields.helperText: A clear, concise description of what your project does and why it exists

fields.label: Installation Steps
fields.placeholder:
npm install my-awesome-project
# or
yarn add my-awesome-project
# or
pnpm add my-awesome-project
fields.helperText: Commands or steps to install the project (one per line)

fields.label: Usage Example
fields.helperText: A code example showing basic usage of your project

fields.label: License
fields.helperText: The open-source license for your project

fields.label: Badges
fields.helperText: Select which badges to include at the top of your README

fields.label: Repository URL
fields.helperText: Full URL to the GitHub/GitLab repository (used for badge links)
